query: SELECT 'total' as metric, CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as value FROM items UNION ALL SELECT 'omar_users' as metric, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(id, ':', name, ':', role) SEPARATOR '; ') as value FROM users WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%omar%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT 'total' as metric, CAST(COUNT(*) AS CHAR) as value FROM items UNION ALL SELECT 'omar_users' as metric, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(id, ':', name, ':', role) SEPARATOR '; ') as value FROM users WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%omar%'
